title: Breadcrumbs
description: Accessible breadcrumbs with per-item icons, swappable separators and optional collapsing when the trail exceeds the max.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Simple trail with the default chevron separator. The last item is the current page.

icons.title: With icons
icons.desc: Each item can declare an optional icon. Useful to reinforce visual hierarchy.

homeIcon.title: With Home icon
homeIcon.desc: `show-home-icon` automatically adds a Home icon to the first item when it doesn't define its own.

separators.title: Separators
separators.desc: Four built-in separators (chevron, slash, dot, arrow) or a custom one via `separator-text`.

truncated.title: Truncated
truncated.desc: When the trail exceeds `max`, middle items collapse into an interactive ellipsis.

props.items: Breadcrumb trail. Each item accepts label, icon, to, href, disabled.
props.max: Maximum visible items. When exceeded, middle items collapse into `…`.
props.showHomeIcon: Adds a Home icon to the first item if it doesn't define `icon`.

emits.navigate: Emitted when clicking an item with `to` (not items with `href` or the current one).
